# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

No actionable correctness findings. Reviewed the branch delta against 35eaa55404219cbf7017a8daf037d61686d2cb62, read the changed drain implementation, and verified with nix develop -c cargo fmt --check, nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings, nix develop -c cargo test --locked drain::tests, nix develop -c cargo test --locked drain_harness, and nix build.

## Amendments

None.
